sections.paragraph:
ἀποτυγχάνω 2 aor. 3 pl. ἀπέτυχον Job 31:16, 3 sg. subj. ἀποτύχῃ (s. τυγχάνω; Hippocr., X., Pla. et al.; pap; Job 31:16; Test12Patr; EpArist 191; 192; Just., D. 2, 5) to have no success, fail w. gen. (Diod S 1, 75, 3 τῆς προαιρέσεως=in the intention; Appian, Hann. 43, §183 τ. πείρας=in the attempt; BGU 1816, 12 [I b.c.] τ. ἐπιβολῆς; PSI 96, 5 [V a.d.] τ. παρακλήσεως; Jos., Ant. 19, 289) ἡ διψυχία πάντων ἀ. τῶν ἔργων αὐτῆς double-mindedness fails in all its works Hm 9:10; cp. 10, 2, 2. W. inf. foll. τοῦ πεῖσαι αὐτόν they failed to persuade him MPol 8:3.—DELG s.v. τυγχάνω.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. pl. = plural
  2. sg. = singular

subj. subj. = subjunctive; subject

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Test12Patr Test12Patr = Testaments of the Twelve Patriarchs, with interpolations II b.c.–III a.d.—List 2

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

gen. gen. = genitive

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Appian Appian , I–II a.d.—List 5

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Hm Hm = Mandates

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

inf. inf. = infinitive

foll. foll. = followed, following

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 124
